# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

plugins:
  - name: cors
    enabled: true
    config:
      origins:
        - "https://app.example.com"
        - "https://admin.example.com"
        - "https://portal.example.com"
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - PATCH
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Accept-Version
        - Authorization
        - Content-Type
        - Origin
        - X-Requested-With
        - X-Correlation-Id
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Correlation-Id
        - X-RateLimit-Limit-Minute
        - X-RateLimit-Remaining-Minute
        - X-RateLimit-Reset-Minute
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
      preflight_continue: false

  - name: key-auth
    enabled: true
    config:
      key_names:
        - apikey
        - x-api-key
      key_in_header: true
      key_in_query: false
      key_in_body: false
      hide_credentials: true
      run_on_preflight: false

  - name: rate-limiting
    enabled: true
    config:
      minute: 300
      hour: 5000
      policy: local
      limit_by: consumer
      fault_tolerant: true
      hide_client_headers: false

services:
  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-service.default.svc.cluster.local:8080
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        config:
          origins:
            - "https://app.example.com"
            - "https://admin.example.com"
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - PATCH
            - DELETE
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
            - Origin
            - X-Requested-With
            - X-Correlation-Id
          exposed_headers:
            - X-Correlation-Id
          credentials: true
          max_age: 3600
          preflight_continue: false

      - name: key-auth
        enabled: true
        config:
          key_names:
            - x-api-key
          key_in_header: true
          key_in_query: false
          key_in_body: false
          hide_credentials: true
          run_on_preflight: false

      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          minute: 200
          hour: 3000
          policy: local
          limit_by: consumer
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false

    routes:
      - name: user-public-route
        paths:
          - /users/public
        strip_path: false
        methods:
          - GET
          - OPTIONS
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            enabled: true
            config:
              origins:
                - "https://app.example.com"
                - "https://portal.example.com"
              methods:
                - GET
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Accept
                - Authorization
                - Content-Type
                - Origin
                - X-Requested-With
              exposed_headers:
                - X-Correlation-Id
              credentials: true
              max_age: 1800
              preflight_continue: false

          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              minute: 500
              hour: 10000
              policy: local
              limit_by: ip
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false

      - name: user-private-route
        paths:
          - /users/private
        strip_path: false
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            enabled: true

              key_in_query: false
              key_in_body: false
              hide_credentials: true
              run_on_preflight: false

          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              minute: 100
              hour: 2000
              policy: local
              limit_by: consumer
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false

  - name: orders-service
    url: http://orders-service.default.svc.cluster.local:8080
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        config:
          origins:
            - "https://app.example.com"
          methods:
            - GET

            - OPTIONS
          headers:

          key_in_header: true
          key_in_query: false
          key_in_body: false
          hide_credentials: true
          run_on_preflight: false

      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          minute: 150
          hour: 2500
          policy: local
          limit_by: consumer
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false

    routes:
      - name: orders-route
        paths:
          - /orders
        strip_path: false
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - OPTIONS
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            enabled: true
            config:
              origins:
                - "https://app.example.com"
              methods:
                - GET
                - POST
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Accept
                - Authorization
                - Content-Type
                - Origin
                - X-Requested-With
                - X-Correlation-Id
              exposed_headers:
                - X-Correlation-Id
              credentials: true
              max_age: 1800
              preflight_continue: false

          - name: key-auth
            enabled: true
            config:
              key_names:
                - x-api-key
              key_in_header: true
              key_in_query: false
              key_in_body: false
              hide_credentials: true
              run_on_preflight: false

          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              minute: 120
              hour: 2000
              policy: local
              limit_by: consumer
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false

consumers:
  - username: web-app
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: web-app-prod-key

  - username: admin-app
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: admin-app-prod-key

  - username: partner-app
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: partner-app-prod-key
